title: Portfolio
text:
Experience

Ozone Overseas Pvt. Ltd. — CRM Automation Executive (06/2023 – 09/2024)

Delivered end-to-end CRM automation using LeadSquared and Freshworks, achieving a 95% reduction in lead response time and improving customer engagement.
Designed and deployed chatbots and automated workflows, increasing customer inquiries by 60% and generating 99% more qualified leads.
Built and integrated RESTful APIs to automate 99% of manual sales operations, ensuring faster data flow between Ozone Secutech, Shopify, and WhatsApp Business APIs.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to optimize digital touchpoints, leading to a 20% boost in online conversions and measurable ROI improvements.
Spearheaded the migration from manual Excel-based reports to automated dashboards, providing real-time analytics for the marketing and sales teams.



Saurabhi Media Pvt. Ltd. — Python Developer (10/2021 – 09/2022)

Developed backend automation tools to streamline production workflows for clients like NDTV and TV18.
Created a Watch Folder Monitoring System using Python, enabling automatic detection and logging of new files across production servers.
Designed data validation pipelines to detect duplicates, missing metadata, and corrupted media assets, ensuring consistent delivery quality.
Collaborated with UI and DevOps teams for cross-platform deployment, reducing file processing time by 40% and improving team collaboration.
Documented codebase with Sphinx and Git, ensuring smooth version control and scalability for future developers.



Areneva Technologies Pvt. Ltd. — Business Analyst Intern (10/2022 – 12/2022)

Supported the implementation of SaaS-based automation solutions for clients in EdTech and Retail sectors.
Analyzed client workflows, prepared requirement documents, and proposed process improvements that increased efficiency by 25%.
Designed interactive Power BI dashboards to visualize key KPIs, automating monthly reporting cycles and reducing manual reporting time by 80%.
Worked alongside senior developers to translate business needs into technical user stories, ensuring alignment between functional and development teams.
Conducted post-deployment performance assessments and compiled impact reports for executive review.

title: Portfolio
text:
Projects

Watch Folder Monitor
A desktop-based Python application designed to automate file tracking and event logging across media production servers. The system monitors specified directories for file creation, modification, or deletion in real time, maintaining a complete audit trail for accountability. It also integrates email notification alerts to inform administrators of critical file changes or missing assets.
Key Features:

Real-time monitoring of multiple folders with parallel thread execution.
SQLite database for storing file logs and change histories.
Configurable alert system with SMTP-based email triggers for anomalies.
GUI built using Tkinter for user-friendly configuration and control.

Tech Stack: Python · Tkinter · Watchdog · SQLite · SMTP
Impact: Improved transparency and reduced manual checks 90 %.


QR Code Generator
Developed a secure QR code management tool for internal documentation and restricted access points. Each QR code encodes a unique identifier to ensure controlled and traceable access. The tool allows batch generation, logo embedding, and custom styling, improving operational efficiency.
Key Features:
- GUI built with PyQt5 for simple QR generation and export.
- Pillow and qrcode libraries for high-resolution image rendering.
- Validation to prevent duplicate or unauthorized code generation.
- Optional encryption for sensitive internal use cases.
Tech Stack: Python · PyQt5 · Pillow · qrcode
Impact: Cut encoding time by 70% and improved access control reliability across departments.


Sustainable Fashion Analytics — UCW Business Analytics Project (2024)
A capstone project analyzing sustainability adoption across 5,000 global fashion brands, focusing on carbon emissions, water consumption, and eco-manufacturing initiatives. Conducted data analytics to identify patterns and recommended sustainable business models for the fashion industry.
Methodology:
- Data cleaning and analysis using Python (Pandas, Matplotlib).
- Built Tableau dashboards to visualize carbon, water, and recycling metrics by region.
- Regression analysis to correlate brand size with sustainability index.
- Proposed circular economy models and industry certifications (GOTS, OEKO-TEX).
Tools: Python · Excel · Tableau
Key Findings:
- Bamboo and hemp identified as the most cost-effective sustainable materials.
- European and Canadian brands showed higher sustainability compliance.
- Suggested lifecycle tracking frameworks for sustainable certification.
Impact: Helped define actionable strategies for sustainability reporting and data-driven ESG decision-making.
